basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has published the Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Jr. Research Fellow position. Candidates holding a Post Graduate degree in Chemistry/Life Science and related disciplines with a minimum of 60% marks or a CGPA of 7/10 are eligible to apply through email. The application process will be active until 14 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry/life Science and related discipline with a minimum of 60% Marks or CGPA of 7/10
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry/life Science and related discipline with a minimum of 60% Marks or CGPA of 7/10. NET or any national level JRF eligibility test qualified, GATE (score greater than 500), DBT JRF (category II). Desirable: Expertise in protein expression and characterization/peptide synthesis and analysis.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry/life Science and related discipline with a minimum of 60% Marks or CGPA of 7/10. NET or any national level JRF eligibility test qualified, GATE (score greater than 500), DBT JRF (category II). Desirable: Expertise in protein expression and characterization/peptide synthesis and analysis.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Chemistry/Life Science or a related discipline with at least 60% marks or a CGPA of 7/10.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/162/2026.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection methods for the Jr. Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Jr. Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: IIT Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110016.
